allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const path = require\(''path''\); const dir = ''examples''; fs.readdirSync\(dir\).filter\(f => f.endsWith\(''.js''\)\).forEach\(f => { const fp = path.join\(dir, f\); let content = fs.readFileSync\(fp, ''utf8''\); if \(content.includes\(''CrowPi3 Framework''\)\) { content = content.replace\(/CrowPi3 Framework/g, ''LatticeSpark Framework''\); fs.writeFileSync\(fp, content\); console.log\(''Updated:'', f\); } }\);")
